Roblox.Api.Develop.Models.ActivationElig.description: The result of various checks for a user's eligibility to activate a given universe from private to public.

allowedAudiences.description: Audiences the universe is allowed to be published to.

creatorTier.description: The creator tier of the universe owner. ['Invalid' = 0, 'Blocked' = 1, 'Private' = 2, 'Trusted' = 3, 'Everyone' = 4]

isPublicPublish.description: Whether the universe is publicly published or not.

isPublishToExistingUniverse.description: Whether the universeId is within the tracked list of distinct allowed published universes.

isUniverseSelect.description: Whether the universe is in the "Select" program.

maturityRated.description: Whether the place has an active content maturity rating or not.

remainingPublicPublishCount.description: How many public publishes are remaining for the given user / group.

Roblox.Api.Develop.Models.GameTemplateMo.description: Represents a game template in API endpoint responses.

gameTemplateType.description: The type of this game template.

hasTutorials.description: Whether this game template has tutorials.

Roblox.Api.Develop.Models.GroupModel.description: A model containing information about a group

Roblox.Api.Develop.Models.IPlaceModel.description: A model containing information about a place

Roblox.Api.Develop.Models.PlaceConfigura.description: A model containing information about a place to be configured

description.description: The new description for the place.

Roblox.Api.Develop.Models.PlaceModel.description: A model containing information about a place

universeId.description: Returns the id of the place's universe, or null - if the place is not part of a universe.

Roblox.Api.Develop.Models.PrivateServerD.description: Model for private server details responses from the UniverseSettings controller.

activeServersCount.description: The number of active VIP servers for this universe. A negative value indicates at least this many exist (i.e. -100 means 100+ active private servers).

activeSubscriptionsCount.description: The number of active VIP server subscriptions. A negative value indicates at least this many exist (i.e. -100 means 100+ active subscriptions).

isEnabled.description: Whether or not VIP servers are enabled on this universe.

price.description: The price of the VIP server.

canUserVote.description: Whether the user can vote on this !:IAsset.

hasUserVoted.description: Whether the user has voted on this !:IAsset.

reasonForNotAbleToVote.description: The reason this !:IAsset cannot be voted on.

isEnabled.description: Whether or not the universe should be enabled for team create

Roblox.Api.Develop.Models.TeamCreateMemb.description: Request model for a TeamCreate membership

Roblox.Api.Develop.Models.UniverseIdPerm.description: A model containing information about a universe permissions

canCloudEdit.description:
Determines whether or not consumer can cloud the target universe
This is only nullable/optional in the context of https://develop.roblox.com/docs#!/Universes/get_v1_universes_universeId_context_permissions endpoint which is consumed only internally. It should be computed and set for all other usages.

canManage.description: Determines whether or not consumer can manage the target universe

universeId.description: The universe Id these permissions reference

Roblox.Api.Develop.Models.UniverseModel.description: Represents a universe in API endpoint results.

creatorName.description: The name of the creator of the universe.

creatorTargetId.description: The id of the user or group that created this universe.

Roblox.Api.Develop.Models.UniversePermis.description: A model containing information about a universe permissions

canCloudEdit.description:
Determines whether or not consumer can cloud the target universe
This is only nullable/optional in the context of https://develop.roblox.com/docs#!/Universes/get_v1_universes_universeId_context_permissions endpoint which is consumed only internally. It should be computed and set for all other usages.

canManage.description: Determines whether or not consumer can manage the target universe

fiatBasePriceId.description: Sets the base price of the experience for Fiat purchases.

fiatProductChangeType.description:
Determines the change type of the Fiat Product Change request.
Can either Activate the product, Update the price, or Deactivate the product.

isForSale.description: Whether the game is offered for sale.

isFriendsOnly.description: Whether game access is limited to friends for user-owned games or group members for group-owned games.

isMeshTextureApiAccessAllowed.description: Sets whether access to APIs for mesh and texture is enabled for this universe.

isRewardedOnDemandAdsAllowed.description: Set is rewarded on-demand ads are allowed for this universe.

playableDevices.description: List of device types this game can be played on.

price.description: Price of the game, in Robux.

universeAnimationType.description: Whether custom animations are allowed in the universe.

universeAvatarType.description: Which avatar types are allowed in the universe.

universeBodyType.description: What avatar body types are allowed by the universe.

universeCollisionType.description: What type of collisions are used by the universe.

universeJointPositioningType.description: What avatar joint positioning type is allowed by the universe.

universeScaleType.description: Whether custom scales allowed in the universe.

allowPrivateServers.description: If the universe allows the use of private servers.

fiatBasePriceId.description: The basePriceId for the Fiat product.

fiatModerationStatus.description: The current moderation status of the game if it is for sale in fiat. ['Invalid' = 0, 'NotModerated' = 1, 'Pending' = 2, 'Approved' = 3, 'Rejected' = 4]

isForSale.description: Whether the game is offered for sale.

isForSaleInFiat.description: Whether the game is offered for sale in fiat.

isFriendsOnly.description: Whether game access is limited to friends for user-owned games or group members for group-owned games.

isMeshTextureApiAccessAllowed.description: Whether access to APIs for mesh and texture is enabled for this universe.

isRewardedOnDemandAdsAllowed.description: Whether rewarded on-demand ads are allowed for this universe.

isStudioAccessToApisAllowed.description: Whether studio access to APIs is allowed or not.

playableDevices.description: List of device types this game can be played on.

price.description: Price of the game, in Robux.

privateServerPrice.description: The price to purchase a private server in robux.

universeAnimationType.description: Whether custom animations are allowed in the universe. ['Standard' = 1, 'PlayerChoice' = 2]

universeAvatarType.description: Which avatar types are allowed in the universe. ['MorphToR6' = 1, 'PlayerChoice' = 2, 'MorphToR15' = 3]

universeBodyType.description: What avatar body types are allowed by the universe. ['Standard' = 1, 'PlayerChoice' = 2]

universeCollisionType.description: What type of collisions are used by the universe. ['InnerBox' = 1, 'OuterBox' = 2]

universeJointPositioningType.description: What avatar joint positioning is allowed by the universe. ['Standard' = 1, 'ArtistIntent' = 2]

universeScaleType.description: Whether custom scales allowed in the universe. ['NoScales' = 1, 'AllScales' = 2]

Roblox.Api.Develop.Models.UniverseTeamCr.description: Team create settings of a universe

isEnabled.description: Whether or not the universe is enabled for team create
Whether or not the universe should be enabled for team create

Roblox.Api.Develop.Models.UserPublicPubl.description: The result of various checks for a user's eligibility to publish a public universe.

hasDevex.description: Whether user is eligible for the developer exchange program. ['Incomplete' = 0, 'NotRequired' = 1, 'Completed' = 2]

hasTransactions.description: Whether user has spent any Robux since 1/1/25, including gift cards. ['Incomplete' = 0, 'NotRequired' = 1, 'Completed' = 2]

idVerified.description: Whether user has completed ID Verification or not. ['Incomplete' = 0, 'NotRequired' = 1, 'Completed' = 2]

Roblox.Develop.Api.UpdatePluginRequest.description: A request model for updating a plugin.

commentsEnabled.description: Whether or not comments should be enabled.
Whether or not the plugin allows comments to be posted.

created.description: The time the plugin was created.

updated.description: The last time the plugin was updated.
